name: Submission & Feedback Pipeline
description: Defines how learner submissions flow through the system — from creation to scored feedback. This is the core value loop: learner produces → system evaluates → learner improves.

speaking_recording.detection: Discord bot detects audio attachment in target channels
speaking_recording.processing_pilot: Founder listens + scores using Speaking Rubric (Appendix C). Sends feedback within 24h.
speaking_recording.processing_scale: 1. Whisper API transcribes audio. 2. AI Speaking Evaluation prompt (#5) scores transcript. 3. Feedback DM sent automatically.
speaking_recording.turnaround: Pilot: within 24 hours. Scale: within 2 hours.

writing_submission.detection: Discord bot detects messages >30 chars in #writing-feedback
writing_submission.processing: Immediate (automated). AI Writing Assessment prompt (#9) evaluates. Reply posted as thread.

accent_recording.processing_scale: AI accent analysis prompt (#11) with Whisper transcription. Identifies specific phoneme errors.
accent_recording.turnaround: Pilot: within 48 hours. Scale: within 4 hours.

task_completion.processing: Immediate. Logs to database. Updates streak. Awards points.

feedback_quality_standards.always_lead_with_positive: Every feedback message starts with what the learner did WELL. Never open with criticism.
feedback_quality_standards.max_3_corrections: No more than 3 specific corrections per submission. More than 3 = overwhelming.
feedback_quality_standards.actionable: Every correction must include: what was wrong, what is correct, and HOW to practice it.
feedback_quality_standards.level_appropriate_language: Feedback for L0 uses simple English (+ Arabic summary). L2-L3 gets more technical terminology.
feedback_quality_standards.encouraging_close: Always end with encouragement and a specific next step.

data_flow.step_2: Bot detects submission (attachment type or text length)
data_flow.step_3: Bot logs to database (discord_id, date, task_type, content reference)
data_flow.step_4: AI processes (or queues for human review in pilot)
data_flow.step_6: Feedback delivered (reply to original message or DM)
data_flow.step_9: Weekly assessment references all submissions that week

human_reviews: Any learner who requests human re-score

notification_triggers.on_all_7_tasks: Bot posts congratulation with bonus points
notification_triggers.on_score_drop: Buddy notified if score drops 15+ points week-over-week
notification_triggers.on_advancement_ready: Bot DMs learner about exam eligibility
